      返回Configurator的org.apache.dubbo.rpc.cluster中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      Configurator ConfiguratorFactory.getConfigurator(URL url)
      get the configurator instance.
      返回变量类型为Configurator的类型的org.apache.dubbo.rpc.cluster中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      static Optional<List<Configurator>> Configurator.toConfigurators(List<URL> urls)
      Convert override urls to map for use when re-refer.
      参数类型为Configurator的org.apache.dubbo.rpc.cluster中的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      default int Configurator.compareTo(Configurator o)
      Sort by host, then by priority 1. the url with a specific host ip should have higher priority than 0.0.0.0 2. if two url has the same host, compare by priority value；
